main.name: Osafo-Osei Jonathan, GEORGE
main.bio: Hi there! I am GEORGE! I've been coding for approximately 2 years now. As a Mobile App Developer I've worked with both startups and medium corporations to help build, scale & integrate technology into their companies and businesses. Along the journey, I realised my passion existed in helping others solve their simple and complex problems with technology. With this passion, I have now, with the help of my capable partners, built some working prototypes of mobile applications across the country. I seek to deliver REAL VALUE by adding catchy features to solve REAL WORLD problems with my projects to help people in the society.
main.contactmessage: Get in touch with me to help you solve your problems with TECHNOLOGY!

education.description: Graduated with fairly good grades and shifted my focus to technology...

education.degree: Higher National Diplomat, Computer Network Management

work.title: Founder and CEO
work.description: Using technology to solve basic and complex problems in and around the society. Currently unregistered

work.title: Mobile App Developer
work.description: Currently working on building mobile apps

testimonials.text: George likes to go all out and put in his maximum best until he has attained his final product...
George is a great developer and a great team player. He is a hard worker and a great team player... He is also fun to be around with.
